title: Claude Fable 5 goes standard on top plans — winners & losers
voiceStyle: Narrate briskly and crisply, like a sharp news explainer with good pace — clear diction, minimal pauses, credible, never rushed into slurring:

scenes.text: Anthropic just *split* Claude users in two
scenes.voiceSegment: Anthropic just split Claude subscribers into winners and losers. Which side are you on?

scenes.subtext: Fine print: up to half your weekly usage
scenes.voiceSegment: Starting July twentieth, Anthropic's newest, most powerful Claude model — Fable 5 — is included on the two top plans, Max and Team Premium, at no extra cost. The fine print: Fable can take up at most half your plan's weekly usage.

scenes.subtext: Your subscription stays — Fable is extra
scenes.voiceSegment: On the cheaper plans — Pro and Team Standard — your subscription stays, but Fable costs extra: pay as you go, like a prepaid phone card. Anthropic starts you off with a one-time hundred-dollar credit.

scenes.label: one-time credit ≈ one big overnight AI job, at Fable 5's usage prices
scenes.voiceSegment: A hundred dollars sounds generous — until you learn one job, an AI coding your app overnight, can eat it.

scenes.label: the price of Anthropic's next-best AI — the priciest Claude ever sold
scenes.voiceSegment: Because Fable is the priciest Claude ever sold — each answer costs about double their next-best model.

scenes.text: *16M* views. Know your side before July 20
scenes.voiceSegment: Anthropic's post on this hit sixteen million views. If you pay for Claude, know your side before July twentieth.

scenes.text: Best AI included — or a meter. Which side are YOU on?
scenes.voiceSegment: Best AI included — or a meter. Which side are you on? Follow for daily AI receipts.
